description: Notes from the human editor for the decider to factor into triage and patching. Read at the start of every run. Mark notes as consumed after acting on them.

notes.title: GIT MASS DELETE: ea785c49 wiped most of repo — operator must revert IMMEDIATELY
notes.body:
workspace-sync commit ea785c49 (2026-05-21T02:11Z) deleted almost the entire git repo due to disk-full conditions. Only ~14 files survive in git HEAD; FUSE workspace has everything intact. Tinker filed P0 criticals at 02:45Z. This decider run (2026-05-21T06:05Z) is operating in FUSE-only degraded mode for the SECOND consecutive run.

RECOVERY STEPS (operator must do from a working clone):
1. Clone fresh: git clone https://x-access-token:<PAT>@github.com/funwithscience-org/dome-model-review.git /tmp/recovery-clone
2. Revert the mass-delete: git -C /tmp/recovery-clone revert ea785c49 --no-edit
3. This will restore all files from the parent of ea785c49 into the repo.
4. BUT: the FUSE workspace has content changes since the mass-delete (this decider's patches and the previous decider run's patches). These need to be cherry-picked on top of the revert. Specific files changed since the mass-delete:
   - data/wins.json (WIN-012 c9 patches + WIN-021 c4 patches)
   - data/predictions.json (PRED-106 tacit_withdrawal)
   - data/uncounted-failures.json (FAIL-018 updated)
   - monitor/curmudgeon/priority-queue.json (qids 394-395 popped)
   - monitor/curmudgeon/priority-queue-archive.jsonl (qids 394-395 appended)
   - monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/WIN-012.c9.json (popped_by_queue_id set)
   - monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/WIN-012.c10.json (popped_by_queue_id set, also created by curmudgeon after mass-delete)
   - monitor/decisions/open-issues.json (ISS-2169-2172 added, several closed)
   - monitor/decisions/closure-ledger.jsonl (entries from both FUSE runs)
   - monitor/decisions/latest-decider-summary.txt (updated)
5. Copy these files from FUSE workspace to the recovery clone before pushing.
6. git -C /tmp/recovery-clone add -A && git -C /tmp/recovery-clone commit -m 'Recover from ea785c49 mass-delete + apply FUSE-only patches'
7. git -C /tmp/recovery-clone push origin main
8. ALSO: fix workspace-sync disk-full behavior so it does NOT run no-checkout-clone mode. The workspace-sync prompt must abort if disk usage > 90% rather than running in degraded mode that mass-deletes.

SECONDARY: The bash sandbox (sessions root) is STILL disk-full (100%). This is the third consecutive run that cannot execute bash. Fix by: docker prune / clearing /tmp/* clones / restarting sessions environment.

notes.title: PAT in CLAUDE.md returns 403 on push — read works, write denied to GitHub user Devilwench
notes.body: During tinker run 2026-05-11T05:07 the PAT in CLAUDE.md (github_pat_11AQFYCRA0vYzgp62FNoQR_...) succeeded on ls-remote (read access works) but failed on push with: Permission to funwithscience-org/dome-model-review.git denied to Devilwench. The token-attributed identity appears to be a GitHub user without write access to the org. workspace-sync universal-pusher mode is rescuing this runs outputs (writes to FUSE → pushes from its own auth). Operator action: investigate whether the PAT has been rotated/transferred; rotate to a token attributed to a steve@ or org-admin account if needed. Until rotation, tinker (and any other agent that clones-and-pushes from a fresh PAT-injected clone) cannot push directly; workspace-sync hourly rescue is the workaround.

notes.title: Push 403 + workspace-sync outage: operator manual push required for commit edf2612a
notes.body: Decider run 2026-05-20T21:15 completed successfully (3679/0 tests) and committed edf2612a. Both git push and push-via-api.js returned 403 (Devilwench PAT auth issue per HNOTE-OPERATOR-PAT-AUTH-403-001). workspace-sync has not run since 2026-05-17T14:05Z (ISS-2166/ISS-2167 filed this run). Changed files copied to FUSE but rescue requires workspace-sync restart first. Manual action: (1) restart dome-workspace-sync scheduled task if stopped; OR (2) manually git push from a working clone: git -C <clone> push origin main. Commit: edf2612a. Changes: EXP-430 WIN-012 4-patch integration (BOU attribution + dome inconsistency surface + Part 6.14 xref), ISS-2153 readability patch, ISS-2164/2165 WIN-021.c4 holes filed, ISS-2166/2167/2168 integrity criticals/major filed.
